news.summary: ZenaTech, Inc., a tech company focusing on AI drone, DaaS, enterprise SaaS, and Quantum Computing solutions, plans to file a patent and expedite the rollout of Counter-UAS technology on their ZenaDrone 1000 drone model in light of a recent executive order. This technology aims to identify, monitor, and address unauthorized or risky drones to safeguard individuals, assets, and airspace. The subsidiary ZenaDrone aims to enhance security measures in response to the policy directive.
news.headline: ZenaTech's ZenaDrone to file patent for Counter-UAS tech on ZenaDrone 1000 in response to US Executive Order, focusing on protecting against unauthorized drones.

news.summary: Little Rock, Arkansas, June 12, 2025 - Inuvo, Inc., a prominent provider of artificial intelligence-powered AdTech solutions listed on NYSE American as INUV, confirmed its previous forecast stating an anticipated revenue surge of at least 25% year-over-year for the second quarter. Additionally, the company finalized a 1-for-10 reverse stock split of its common stock after receiving shareholder approval during the Annual Meeting conducted on May 22, 2025.
news.headline: Inuvo reiterates 25% Q2 YOY growth and executes 1:10 reverse stock split in shareholder-approved move.

news.summary: On June 12, 2025, in Toronto, NetraMark Holdings Inc. (CSE: AIAI) (OTCQB: AINMF) (Frankfurt: PF0), a company specializing in artificial intelligence solutions for the pharmaceutical industry, revealed that Dr. Joseph Geraci, the founder of NetraMark, led a publication discussing the potential for AI/ML to enhance data quality and patient results in clinical trials. Dr. Geraci's work highlights the significant market potential for AI to streamline access to actionable insights in clinical trial design.
news.headline: NetraMark founder Dr. Joseph Geraci coauthors publication on AI/ML in clinical trials, highlighting potential for improved data quality and patient outcomes. Company: NetraMark Holdings Inc. (CSE: AIAI, OTCQB: AINMF, Frankfurt: PF0).
GERMAN GOVERNMENT OFFICIAL ON G7: WILL BE MEETING WITH UKRAINE'S ZELENSKIY ON UKRAINE SUPPORT

news.summary: Utilizing the Grok 3 platform for automating cryptocurrency trades may appear advantageous, however challenges such as potential data loss and unreliable signals could negatively impact your results in the rapidly evolving market environment. It is crucial to carefully consider these risks before implementing automated trading strategies to protect your investments.
news.headline: Grok 3 allowed to trade crypto experiences issues like data loss and inaccurate signals, impacting performance in fast markets.

news.summary: The Global Retail E-Commerce Market is projected to grow from USD 7.29 trillion in 2025 to USD 15.62 trillion by 2032, with a CAGR of 11.5%. This growth is driven by the increasing popularity of online shopping, accelerated by the COVID-19 pandemic. The report by Coherent Market Insights indicates that the fashion segment will hold a significant market share in 2025, and online marketplaces will dominate sales channels. Asia Pacific is expected to lead the market, with the Middle East experiencing the fastest growth. Consumers prefer online shopping for its convenience, driving market growth, although concerns about data privacy and logistics challenges could hinder it to some extent.
news.headline: Global Retail E-Commerce Market to reach $15.62 trillion by 2032 with a CAGR of 11.5%. Asia Pacific expected to dominate.

news.summary: In New York, Macy’s will host its renowned Macy's 4th of July Fireworks® show on Friday, July 4, at the Brooklyn Bridge. This spectacular event will illuminate the New York City skyline with vibrant colors and exciting sounds, providing unforgettable experiences for people throughout the nation. The 49th edition of this grand Independence Day celebration will showcase over 80,000 shells bursting in the air. The show will feature 30 vivid colors and impressive effects, including cutting-edge projection mapping on the iconic Brooklyn Bridge, captivating audiences with its visual splendor.
news.headline: Macy's celebrates 4th of July Fireworks with 80,000 shells, 30 colors, on Brooklyn Bridge. Spectacular show for millions.

news.summary: In Cincinnati, Olay and Secret, popular brands under Procter & Gamble, have unveiled the Summer Fizz Scent collection. This limited-edition line includes serum-infused body washes from Olay and clinical strength antiperspirants from Secret. The collection aims to provide a revitalizing burst of freshness, offering fruity fragrances and advanced skin-nourishing technology. It promises a delightful everyday escape with superior skin benefits. Get ready to embrace the summer vibes with this exciting new launch!
news.headline: Olay and Secret launch limited-edition Summer Fizz Scent collection, featuring serum-infused body washes and antiperspirants.

news.summary: Moovila, a prominent AI-powered project automation platform catering to managed service providers (MSPs), was awarded the title of Innovative Vendor of the Year at the 2025 North America Spotlight Awards by the Global Technology Industry Association. The prestigious accolade recognizes Moovila's cutting-edge technology and industry leadership in the field. The event took place in Charleston, South Carolina on June 12, 2025.
news.headline: Moovila wins 2025 GTIA Innovative Vendor Award for impactful industry advancements at North America Spotlight Awards.

news.summary: ROLLER is dedicated to enhancing the world with joyful experiences by equipping attraction venues with user-friendly technology. Based in London, as of June 12, 2025, ROLLER serves as the comprehensive platform for venue management in the leisure industry.
news.headline: ROLLER and Activeon deepen partnership for growth in 72+ locations, enhancing experiences with tech. London, June 12, 2025.
German Government Official on G7: Canadian representatives do not expect wide-ranging G7 statement.

news.summary: A leading figure in women's gymnastics, Valorie Kondos Field guided the UCLA team to an impressive seven NCAA championships. Even after stepping down, she continues to embody her unique and authentic style, making a lasting impact on the sport.
news.headline: Valorie Kondos Field led UCLA gymnastics to 7 NCAA championships and embraces her unique style.

news.summary: Oklo, a nuclear startup, experienced a significant surge in its shares on Wednesday following a government deal. This resulted in a price target increase by analysts. However, on Thursday, the company witnessed a decline in its shares due to a planned share offering. The stock of Oklo is attracting attention as the focus shifts towards the 'AI Revolution', with Donald Trump in the spotlight.
news.headline: Oklo's stock rises after government deal, gets price target hike, but falls after share offering. Trump emphasizes 'AI Revolution'.

news.summary: In 2025, D-Wave stands out as the top performer among quantum computing stocks. The company specializes in annealing quantum technology, positioning itself as a leader in the industry. Recent discussions question whether D-Wave, a pioneer in quantum computing, receives adequate recognition for its advancements.
news.headline: D-Wave leads quantum computing stocks in 2025; pioneering annealing tech. Article questions if firm receives due recognition.

news.summary: CommScope has been selected by Liberty Global to enhance multiple networks for virtualized Distributed Access Architecture. The company made this announcement in Claremont, North Carolina. Liberty Global's decision to opt for CommScope's services, which saw the latter's stock ticker NASDAQ listing as COMM, comes as a significant development.
news.headline: Liberty Global selects CommScope for DOCSIS 4.0 DAA deployment in Europe. Upgrading multiple networks for virtualized DAA.

news.summary: At the ESH 2025 event in Seoul, South Korea, Sky Labs has attracted worldwide interest with their innovative product - the first ring-type cuffless blood pressure monitor. This ground-breaking device is revolutionizing the way blood pressure is monitored globally.
news.headline: Sky Labs in South Korea unveils first cuffless blood pressure monitor at ESH 2025, gaining global attention.

news.summary: Locala has debuted a new tool called Omni Planner in New York, aiming to aid advertisers in merging online and offline engagement data for enhanced performance across digital and in-store platforms. Omni Planner seeks to streamline campaign planning processes, transitioning marketers from analysis to implementation. By amalgamating digital and physical cues, the tool provides comprehensive visibility throughout the entire marketing funnel and enables the creation of customized strategies on a local level. The objective is to empower advertisers to plan with greater effectiveness and achieve more robust outcomes in all markets.
news.headline: Locala launches Omni Planner to merge online and offline data for enhanced media strategies, ensuring full-funnel visibility and improved ad performance.

news.summary: In Wayne, Pennsylvania, PurpleLab®, a prominent US real-world healthcare claims data provider, has collaborated with Comscore, a worldwide consumer behavior measurement expert. They have announced a key partnership to offer PurpleLab's detailed healthcare targeting segments as ID-free Predictive Audiences on The Trade Desk's Contextual Marketplace. This move comes in response to alterations in state privacy laws affecting pharmaceutical advertising. This strategic alliance aims to provide precise targeting solutions to address these regulatory changes in the industry.
news.headline: PurpleLab and Comscore team up to offer healthcare predictive audiences on The Trade Desk. Helps pharma industry amid privacy changes.

news.summary: Montreal-based company Optable has been chosen by Unity to provide its technology for the recently introduced Audience Hub. This innovative platform allows brand marketers to tailor specific audiences of gamers while prioritizing privacy. Unity has collaborated with Optable to give marketers a fresh approach to connect with players through a reliable and efficient system for audience coordination, accurate targeting, and cross-channel engagement. The partnership aims to enhance brand marketing strategies by leveraging Optable's identity management and data collaboration platform within Unity's Audience Hub.
news.headline: Optable chosen by Unity to run Audience Hub for brand marketers, enabling smarter targeting of gamers. New platform promises precision targeting and privacy-first approach.

news.summary: In NOIDA, India, HCLTech revealed that Volvo Cars has selected them as a key provider for engineering services.
news.headline: Volvo Cars selects HCLTech as strategic supplier for engineering services in collaboration.

news.summary: In Houston, Oceaneering International, Inc. disclosed that its Offshore Projects Group has secured a vessel services deal with a key operator for utilizing the MPSV Harvey Deep Sea. The agreement encompasses the deployment of two Oceaneering Millennium work class remotely operated vehicles aboard the vessel. Currently leased by Oceaneering until February 2027, the MPSV Harvey Deep Sea is set to support the operator in carrying out subsea tasks like inspections and maintenance.
news.headline: Oceaneering signs vessel services deal for MPSV Harvey Deep Sea till 2027; equipped with two work class ROVs.

news.summary: On June 11, 2025, DayOne Data Centers, a major player in digital infrastructure, entered into a Corporate Renewable Energy Supply Scheme (CRESS) deal with Malaysia's Tenaga Nasional Berhad (TNB). This agreement between the two global hubs, Singapore and Kuala Lumpur, reinforces their commitment to sustainable energy practices. This partnership signifies a significant step towards harnessing renewable energy sources and reducing carbon footprint in the region.
news.headline: DayOne Data Centers signs CRESS agreement with TNB for 500MW renewable energy; significant step towards sustainability.

news.summary: Nextworld, a pioneering enterprise software company, unveiled a groundbreaking pricing model in Denver on June 12, 2025. This model eliminates complexity, allowing businesses to create without constraints and at a significantly lower cost compared to traditional platforms. With this new approach, businesses can operate without limits and save significantly on expenses.
news.headline: Nextworld introduces transparent pricing for enterprise software, empowering businesses with cost savings and flexibility.

news.summary: ST. LOUIS--Bunge Global SA (NYSE: BG) shared today that its wholly-owned subsidiary, Bunge Limited Finance Corp. (“BLFC”), has extended the expiration date of its Exchange Offers. The offers are for exchanging any and all outstanding 2.000% Notes due 2026, 4.900% Notes due 2027, and 3.200% Notes due 2031. The Exchange Offers were extended by BLFC.
news.headline: Bunge extends exchange offers for outstanding notes; including 2.000% due 2026, 4.900% due 2027, and 3.200% due 2031.

news.summary: On Thursday morning, alternative cryptocurrencies such as DOGE, SOL, and ADA performed better than Bitcoin, which experienced a decline. Experts referred to this decline as a regular pullback.
news.headline: 'Dogecoin, Solana, and Cardano drop as altcoins dip in market correction; outpacing Bitcoin's losses.'

news.summary: Safe Pro Group Inc., an AI-powered security solutions leader, recently highlighted in a feature by Grist Magazine titled “How Three Years of War Have Impacted Ukraine’s Forests and Communities.” The company, listed on Nasdaq as SPAI, is lauded for its role in addressing the lasting threat of landmines and unexploded ordnance in the region. Through AI and drone technology, Safe Pro is aiding in a critical technological effort to combat these hazardous legacies of war, marking a significant step in enhancing safety.
news.headline: Safe Pro Group's AI drone tech aids Ukraine's war-torn lands—Nasdaq: SPAI leads with solutions for landmines via Grist Magazine.
INDIA PLANE CRASH: AT LEAST 25 PEOPLE INJURED, LOCAL POLICE ON X

news.summary: In celebration of its 30th anniversary, Maddie’s Fund®, a national family foundation founded by Dave and Cheryl Duffield to improve the quality of life for companion animals, has bestowed $30,000 grants each to 10 animal well-being organizations. These grants were awarded as part of the Maddie’s® 30th Anniversary Hero Awards initiative, marking the foundation’s commitment to advancing companion animal and human well-being over the past three decades.
news.headline: Maddie's Fund's 30th Anniversary Hero Awards provided $300K in grants to 10 organizations, celebrating their impact in animal welfare. #ThanksToMaddie.

TRUMP: THE GREAT, BIG, BEAUTIFUL BILL WILL GROW THE ECONOMY LIKE IT HAS NEVER GROWN BEFORE. AT THE SAME TIME, IT IS CUTTING EXPENSES BY 1.6 TRILLION DOLLARS. IT PUTS OUR COUNTRY ON THE RIGHT TRACK, PLUS! MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!!! - TRUTH SOCIAL

news.summary: On June 12, 2025, Vytanutra, based in Irvine, California, unveiled their latest product, Vytanutra C, Ascorbic Acid, a scientifically crafted supplement aimed at providing continual immune support and promoting Collagen Synthesis. This innovative formula is designed to deliver consistent benefits throughout the day, offering a boost to overall health.
news.headline: Vytanutra releases Vytanutra C, Ascorbic Acid supplement for daily immune support with sustained release.

Brazil Retail Sales (M/M) April: -0.4% (est -0.5%; prev 0.8%) - Retail Sales (Y/Y): 4.8% (est 3.6%; prev -1.0%) - Retail Sales Broad (M/M): -1.9% (est -1.3%; prev 1.9%) - Retail Sales Broad (Y/Y): 0.8% (est 1.7; prev -1.2%)

news.summary: In Newton, Massachusetts, Diversified Healthcare Trust has recently finalized a secured revolving credit facility valued at $150 million. The collateral for this facility includes 14 senior housing communities comprising 2,632 living units under the management of Five Star Senior Living, a division of AlerisLife Inc. This new credit facility is aimed at bolstering DHC's overall liquidity to meet various business requirements. The initial term of the revolving credit facility spans four years, with the option to extend for two additional six-month periods.
news.headline: Diversified Healthcare Trust finalizes a $150M secured revolving credit facility backed by 14 senior housing communities, enhancing liquidity.

news.summary: Autonomize AI, a leading provider of AI-powered healthcare solutions, revealed today that it has secured $28 million in Series A funding. This latest funding round has pushed the total capital raised by the company to $32 million. Notable investors included Valtruis, The Cigna Group Ventures, and Tau Ventures, alongside other strategic backers. Existing investors like Asset Management Ventures, ATX Venture Partners, and Capital Factory also contributed to the round. The newly acquired funds will be utilized to support Autonomize AI's mission of advancing healthcare through AI technology.
news.headline: Autonomize AI secures $28M Series A to advance AI solutions in healthcare and life sciences, with $32M raised to date.

news.summary: In Mountain View, California, Simbian® has revealed the "AI SOC LLM Leaderboard," aiming to enhance security for enterprises through AI technology. This innovative benchmark offers a thorough assessment of LLM (Logistic Linear Models) performance within Security Operations Centers (SOCs). The evaluation involves various attacks and SOC tools in a simulated IT setting, spanning alert processing from intake to resolution and analysis. Moreover, a public leaderboard is available for tracking the performance metrics.
news.headline: Simbian introduces "AI SOC LLM Leaderboard" to measure LLM performance in SOCs accurately, presenting a public leaderboard.

news.summary: Tamnoon, a prominent player in Managed Cloud Security Remediation, introduced Managed CDR (Cloud Detection and Response), a new managed service intended to confirm, provide context to, and address cloud security alarms. The service is based on AWS and is initially collaborating with Wiz Defend, Amazon GuardDuty, CrowdStrike Falcon, and Orca Security, with further partnerships on the horizon. This cloud security-agnostic service is currently merging with the existing CNAPP offerings' runtime detection feature.
news.headline: Tamnoon introduces Managed CDR service to enhance cloud security, collaborating with AWS and key solutions, aiming to reduce security risks.

news.summary: In Seattle, approximately 28% of homes in the US are being sold above the asking price, a decrease from 32% compared to the previous year. This information comes from a recent report by Redfin, known as a technology-driven real estate brokerage. This percentage is the lowest recorded for this time of year since 2020 when the housing market was halted due to the start of the pandemic. The decrease in homes selling above asking price serves as an indicator of a shift towards a buyer’s market in many parts of the country. To provide context, over half, 53%, of homes were sold above asking price previously.
news.headline: 28% of homes sell above asking price, lowest springtime level since 2020, signaling buyer's market shift.

news.summary: In a joint statement, the Wireless Power Consortium and NFC Forum from Washington and Wakefield, Mass., have addressed industry standard development. This collaboration aims to promote technological advancement by fostering cooperation between the two entities. It signifies an important step towards establishing unified standards that will benefit consumers and businesses alike. This initiative brings together leading experts to work towards creating a seamless user experience. The partnership combines resources and expertise to drive innovation in wireless power technology and NFC, with the aim of enhancing connectivity and efficiency in various sectors. Stay tuned for further updates on this significant collaboration.
news.headline: Wireless Power Consortium and NFC Forum collaborate on industry standard development in Washington & Wakefield.

news.summary: Advertible, a leading company in intelligent rendering technology, is commemorating significant growth, industry accolades, and innovative product development after a year of operations. In celebration of their one-year milestone, the team is preparing to showcase their latest advancements and foster stronger partnerships with international collaborators in Cannes, France. Central to Advertible's core mission is enhancing native rendering capabilities and fulfilling the potential for extensive customization on a large scale, all while enhancing the overall rendering experience.
news.headline: Advertible marks rapid growth with industry recognition and innovative products, celebrating one-year anniversary with advancements in Cannes, France.

news.summary: In Silicon Valley, Versa, a top player in Universal Secure Access Service Edge (SASE), revealed a new collaboration with OPSWAT, a key player in critical infrastructure protection (CIP) cybersecurity solutions. The joint effort aims to boost real-time device security monitoring within the Versa SASE Client. This client merges connectivity and security for users and devices, enabling instant best-path routing and dynamic security enforcement. The partnership underscores the focus on enhancing secure access solutions.
news.headline: Versa partners with OPSWAT to boost device security for SASE, offering real-time monitoring capabilities for users and their devices.

news.summary: In Boston, InvoiceCloud has introduced its AI Report Generator tool, aimed at offering utility, government, and insurance billers with instant reporting capabilities. This tool is designed to streamline the reporting process and provide real-time analytics for organizations managing bills.
news.headline: InvoiceCloud in Boston released AI Report Generator for utility, government, insurance billers for real-time insights.

news.summary: Datavant, a prominent health data platform company, has recently disclosed its acquisition of Ontellus, a major provider of health records retrieval and claims intelligence. This acquisition is particularly notable as it involves Aquiline, a private investment firm renowned for its focus on financial services and technology, and Capstreet, a Houston-based lower middle market private equity firm. Through this deal, Ontellus will integrate with Datavant to offer a comprehensive digital platform. The acquisition aims to combine Datavant's and Ontellus' expertise to create a seamless, efficient system.
news.headline: Datavant acquires Ontellus to modernize medical record retrieval, claims intelligence solutions._integration of digital-first platform.

news.summary: Boston-based athenahealth, a prominent provider of network-enabled healthcare software and services, alongside partners Humana and Your Health, a South Carolina primary care practice, has been honored with a 2025 Points of Light Award from KLAS. The award was bestowed for their collaborative case study titled "Closing Care Gaps & Reducing Administrative Burden Through Improved Data Sharing." The recognition underscores the success of their efforts in integrating efficient and pertinent data sharing practices for improving healthcare.
news.headline: athenahealth, Humana, and Your Health receive 2025 Points of Light Award for reducing care gaps and administrative burden in healthcare.

news.summary: Nile, a prominent player in the enterprise networking sector, based in San Jose, California, unveiled its latest innovation - the Nile Experience Intelligence (NXI). This cutting-edge generative AI tool is aimed at preemptively addressing network problems to prevent disruptions for IT teams, users, IoT devices, and uphold the performance benchmarks set by Nile's Network-as-a-Service (NaaS) assurance. NXI marks a significant advancement in providing secure, AI-driven wired and wireless solutions.
news.headline: Nile launches NXI, a generative AI solution for optimizing enterprise networking, designed to resolve issues proactively.

news.summary: Agilent Technologies Inc. (NYSE: A) has revealed its plans to unveil the latest Hybrid Multisampler alongside the new LC Single Quadrupole Mass Spectrometers at the forthcoming HPLC 2025 conference in Bruges, Belgium. The innovative products are aimed at enhancing laboratory productivity and ensuring better performance. Visitors at the event will have the opportunity to witness firsthand how these technologies can optimize processes and improve analytical results. Be sure to check out the Agilent Infinit for more details.
news.headline: Agilent will debut Hybrid Multisampler & LC Single Quadrupole Mass Spectrometers at HPLC 2025 conference in Belgium to enhance lab efficiency.

news.summary: In San Francisco, Viz.ai, a prominent AI-driven healthcare company, revealed that their latest product, Viz Subdural Plus, has obtained FDA clearance under the 510(k) pathway. This innovative solution is the inaugural and all-encompassing method for measuring the extent of conditions such as subdural hemorrhages in the subdural region through non-contrast computed tomography (NCCT) images. The Viz Subdural Plus module aims to enhance clinical decisions by automatically quantifying the size of these collections.
news.headline: Viz.ai gets FDA clearance for Viz Subdural Plus to measure subdural hemorrhages on non-contrast CT images.

news.summary: A prominent financial technology company, FIS (NYSE: FIS), has been acknowledged as an Overall Leader in the most recent Digital Issuance Provider Scorecard by Javelin Strategy & Research. This recognition highlights FIS’ standing as a top provider of payment solutions worldwide. With acclaim from various analyst firms, FIS continues to demonstrate its expertise in facilitating efficient money transfers. Digital issuance, a crucial process in the financial sector, plays a pivotal role in making money transactions smoother.
news.headline: FIS named a top leader in digital issuance by Javelin Strategy & Research, underlining its fintech market presence.

news.summary: Airia, based in Atlanta, has recently implemented significant security upgrades to BrainFreeze, its comprehensive Education AI Platform.
news.headline: Airia unveiled new security features for BrainFreeze AI Platform in education sector, providing granular controls beyond one-size-fits-all approach.

news.summary: Atlanta-based Volato Group, Inc., a technology-centric private aviation firm, has disclosed plans to acquire M2i Global, Inc., a critical mineral supply chain developer. The agreement, detailed in a non-binding term sheet, will see Volato absorb M2i Global in a strategic move aimed at enhancing the consolidated entity's scalability, access to capital, and overall long-term growth prospects. Volato is listed on the NYSE American under the ticker symbol "SOAR," while M2i Global trades on the OTCQB under "MTWO."
news.headline: Volato (NYSE: SOAR) & M2i Global (OTCQB: MTWO) to combine in strategic acquisition for industrial scale & growth.

news.summary: In Austin, Texas, ImmunoPrecise Antibodies Ltd. revealed groundbreaking findings showing their AI-designed GLP-1 receptor agonist (GLP-1RA) peptides have achieved excellent in vitro results. These peptide sequences exhibit equal or better receptor activation compared to Semaglutide, a top GLP-1 therapy and highly successful global drug. ImmunoPrecise is a frontrunner in AI-driven drug discovery and biotherapeutics, listed on NASDAQ as IPA. The independent analysis highlighted the potential of these peptides, showcasing their efficacy in comparison to industry benchmarks.
news.headline: ImmunoPrecise Antibodies' AI-designed GLP-1 peptides show superior receptor activation than Semaglutide.

news.summary: In a recent report released today, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has risen to 6.5%, marking an increase of 1.2 percentage points from the previous quarter. This rise in unemployment corresponds to approximately 2.4 million people now being without jobs. Additionally, the report highlighted a decrease in the GDP growth rate to 2.8% for the current fiscal year, down from the earlier projected 3.5%. The government has announced various measures to address these economic challenges, including job creation programs and stimulus packages to boost the economy. The report also indicated a surge in inflation, with consumer prices increasing by 4.2% compared to last year. Experts are concerned about the overall economic outlook and the impact these trends may have on the population.
news.headline: Apple faces 10 major hurdles ranging from AI to tariffs and antitrust issues.
